focus: Slice fix success stories and hopeless slice threads

PAIN.quote: I replaced the lighter Alta shaft with the Hazardous Black stiff shaft. I even bought a heavier weight for the club head thinking a combination of stiff shaft + heavy weight head + lower loft would get me to hit less slices. Nothing has worked
PAIN.source: GolfWRX - Nothing I do fixes my slice please help

PAIN.quote: I go to the range and tinker all day long and nothing works consistently. I still sent 70%+ of my drives with either a fade or it starts right and slices hard right
PAIN.source: GolfWRX - Nothing I do fixes my slice please help

PAIN.quote: I took a lesson, he corrected my grip and turned my left hand over the grip. He even told me to close my front shoulder. Still, slice/push everything
PAIN.source: GolfWRX - Nothing I do fixes my slice please help

PAIN.quote: I already got with a instructor, he changed my grip and closed my front shoulder. Still nothing consistent even after multiple range trips and rounds. That's why I'm confused. Felt like I was fed a bunch of nonsense
PAIN.source: GolfWRX - Nothing I do fixes my slice please help

PAIN.quote: For everyone saying the G400 Max is a 'fairway finder'....not for me. I find nothing easier/better about this driver
PAIN.source: GolfWRX - Nothing I do fixes my slice please help
PAIN.context: Premium driver not living up to claims

PAIN.quote: I just can't square the clubface no matter if I have a stiff shaft/heavier club head and a rolled over grip
PAIN.source: GolfWRX - Nothing I do fixes my slice please help

PAIN.quote: I've tried everything in my power to shallow the club out. I still couldn't get anything to be straight. If anything that caused more problems with topping the ball
PAIN.source: GolfWRX - Nothing I do fixes my slice please help

PAIN.quote: I went to the driving range about a month ago...sliced every single one of my drives and could not hit my irons solidly for my life. It was horrible
PAIN.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice shocking fix

PAIN.quote: Went out golfing (18 holes) with my family, either sliced or topped every drive
PAIN.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice shocking fix

PAIN.quote: I spend so much time researching online how to fix a slice. Then spent weeks trying to fix my apparent out-to-in swing path, fix my head being ahead of the ball at impact, trying to turn over my hands more after impact. Nothing. Still was slicing every drive
PAIN.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice shocking fix

PAIN.quote: Not swinging hard has got to be the number one hardest thing for me to do, as well as most people I see play
PAIN.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice shocking fix

PAIN.quote: I get in trouble trying to swing way too hard and be a hero on every shot and out drive everyone off the tee
PAIN.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice shocking fix

PAIN.quote: I took a full swing lesson with cameras at golf tec and they fixed my stance. I'm hitting more consistent but I'm still slicing bad. Sometimes, the ball will hit the ground and roll laterally to the right!
PAIN.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice shocking fix

HOPE.quote: I was so frustrated, I just set up over the next ball and took a really nice and slow swing, because I was giving up. And that one went straight down the middle of the driving range
HOPE.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice shocking fix

HOPE.quote: That's all I had been doing wrong the whole entire time--swinging too hard! Swung nice and slow the next 10 drives and they all went straight down the middle
HOPE.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice shocking fix

HOPE.quote: I can't believe the fix was as simple as that. I had thought I was doing something else wrong with my club path, face, or hands. But I was just trying to swing too hard
HOPE.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice shocking fix

HOPE.quote: I still dont believe that my 5 iron goes 150 straight as an arrow when I swing like an 80 year old woman, it just doesnt seem possible but it works
HOPE.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice shocking fix

HOPE.quote: Pure contact beats out speed with poor contact every single time
HOPE.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice shocking fix

HOPE.quote: The score sure does drop a whole heck of a lot with the soft swing
HOPE.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice shocking fix

HOPE.quote: Shaved off a whopping 18 strokes the first time I played after my fix
HOPE.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice shocking fix

HOPE.quote: I still fade the ball about 10 yards but its very controllable and predictable. I actually like having a natural fade. You always know what its going to do and you can play to it
HOPE.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice shocking fix

HOPE.quote: Low and behold I hit them dead straight and prob gained about 5-10 meters!!!! I actually left out a little laugh as it seemed too easy
HOPE.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice shocking fix
HOPE.context: Laughing at how easy the fix was

ROOT_CAUSE.quote: You are steep and over the top. At best you will pull the ball if you can square the face
ROOT_CAUSE.source: GolfWRX - Nothing I do fixes my slice please help

ROOT_CAUSE.quote: The instructor showed me video of my swing. Back swing is too straight up and not at that 45 degree angle and when I come down--I come down outside to in
ROOT_CAUSE.source: GolfWRX - Nothing I do fixes my slice please help

ROOT_CAUSE.quote: You hit a slice because of your club face to club path relationship...period. When you understand this relationship then you will end the cycle of believing that your equipment or your swing are responsible
ROOT_CAUSE.source: GolfWRX - Nothing I do fixes my slice please help

ROOT_CAUSE.quote: I think what was happening was I was trying to swing so hard that most of my body, including my head, was way in front of the ball at impact--resulting in an open clubface
ROOT_CAUSE.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice shocking fix

ROOT_CAUSE.quote: When I slice it is still a controlled back swing but a jerk and rush down at the ball
ROOT_CAUSE.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice shocking fix

SOLUTIONS_TRIED.quote: A good instructor should do more than just tell you what's wrong, they should help you find the 'feels' to correct the problem or drills that work for you
SOLUTIONS_TRIED.source: GolfWRX - Nothing I do fixes my slice please help
SOLUTIONS_TRIED.context: Instructor should provide feels not just analysis

SOLUTIONS_TRIED.quote: Swing changes are hardest to implement with the driver. You should be working on changes with the irons first
SOLUTIONS_TRIED.source: GolfWRX - Nothing I do fixes my slice please help

SOLUTIONS_TRIED.quote: If youre in between clubs, or not sure, CLUB UP and swing soft
SOLUTIONS_TRIED.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice shocking fix
SOLUTIONS_TRIED.context: Club up and swing soft advice

SOLUTIONS_TRIED.quote: Swinging at the maximum effort that is barely within our control should be our goal
SOLUTIONS_TRIED.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice shocking fix
SOLUTIONS_TRIED.context: Find effort level barely within control

SOLUTIONS_TRIED.quote: Smooth transition and steady tempo help keep the clubhead speed up and the swing under control
SOLUTIONS_TRIED.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice shocking fix

VILLAIN.quote: Pride gets in the way, and golf ads/golfers make it appear that you should swing hard all the time and its all about distance
VILLAIN.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice shocking fix
VILLAIN.context: Golf industry promotes swing hard mentality

VILLAIN.quote: No one had ever told me to slow down my swing a little. They got all technical and everything...and here I wasn't even doing anything technically wrong
VILLAIN.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice shocking fix

VILLAIN.quote: Swinging slow is simply a bandaid and not a fix
VILLAIN.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice shocking fix
VILLAIN.context: Counter-argument - slow swing just a bandaid

VILLAIN.quote: I play with a lot of older guys and they're always sayin how far they used to hit it n with my size/strength I need to be hittin it 300! So then obviously I try to do it n end up about 230 and usually in the adjacent fairway
VILLAIN.source: TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice shocking fix
VILLAIN.context: Peer pressure to hit far causing slice

sources_covered: GolfWRX - Nothing I do fixes my slice please help
TheSandTrap - Finally cured my slice shocking fix
high_value_themes_identified: Equipment changes alone don't fix slice
Lessons often don't help - 'felt like nonsense'
Golf industry promotes swing hard mentality
Peer pressure to hit far causes slice
